name: Clockwork
description:
Clockwork was born on November 6th, 1996. She is currently 24-years-old.

Clockwork's weapon consists of two large, serrated knives.

Her childhood stuffed giraffe toy is named Jaffy.

Clockwork has a lot of French blood in her veins however, she doesn't have an accent.

She was canonically in a relationship with Toby Rogers (aka Ticci-Toby) but they broke up.

She isn't very careful; at all. Clockwork is very reckless when it comes to fights and killing sprees, mainly because she'll practically have the balls to fight just about anyone, but because of this she usually gets hurt a lot.

Clockwork hates Slender Man with a burning passion.

She despises being called by her previous name before she became a murderer. So never call her 'Natalie'.

Clockwork has a fixation with gore and frequently likes to draw gruesome stuff. Such as people getting brutally stabbed and tortured, bloody machetes, and other different kinds of weapons, etc. She sees it as a normal everyday hobby for her, while others think it's 'weird' and 'suspicious', due to her state of mind.

She's close friends with Zero and Jeff the Killer.

(My first tim creating a character so I'm sorry for mistakes!)
creator: StephanieBrown
